title: Complete L4 chat integration tests: predict on item and score update via chat

comments.author: ryan
comments.text:
## What remains from the console chat integration test pass

### L4b — predict on recent item (plexus.item.last + plexus.predict)
Fixed ModuleNotFoundError for _item_helpers.py by copying from dev to installed Plexus. Retest needed to confirm plexus.item.last + plexus.predict work end-to-end via chat. Note: the fix was applied to the installed Plexus copy, not committed to the repo — needs to be committed.

### L4c — update score configuration via chat (plexus.score.update)
User story: chat agent fetches current YAML, proposes a tweak, calls plexus.score.update, and returns confirmation. Not yet tested. System prompt includes a plexus.score.update example.

### L4d — guidelines update via chat
Not yet tested.

## Notes
- _item_helpers.py copy fix should be committed to the repo (not just local installed copy)
- Context window overflow mitigated by _truncate_envelope; test with realistic data to confirm
- Test harness: /tmp/chat_score_update_test.py
